title: Donut Worry, Be Happy
excerpt: Even though I come off as easy going and relaxed, there are actually many things I worry about. Some little, some big, but more often than not, I worry about things that aren't worthy of my time and energy. When…
body:
Even though I come off as easy going and relaxed, there are actually many things I worry about. Some little, some big, but more often than not, I worry about things that aren't worthy of my time and energy. When I get into one of these spirals, I remind myself that worrying doesn't change the outcome. Also it takes more energy to be negative than positive, so why not just focus on the brighter side of life and spend time being grateful and happy?!

Another confession: I originally had a rainbow donut (blue frosting) for the photo but I was so worried about making it look perfect that I got frustrated and took a bite out of it.

So happy tomorrow is Friday and National Donut Day! Celebrate with Dunkin Donuts today and get a free donut with the purchase of any beverage. Woohoo!
